allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach \($f in @\('bike.png','dark-rider.png','bright-rider.png','end.png','Remove the backgroun.png','Large Red.png','redlights.png','oni.png','Street oni.png','slim logo.png'\)\) { $img = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("C:\\Users\\vacav\\slim old\\$f"\); $hasAlpha = $false; foreach \($pt in @\(@\(0,0\), @\(5,5\), @\(\($img.Width-1\),0\), @\(0,\($img.Height-1\)\), @\(\($img.Width/2\),0\)\)\) { $p = $img.GetPixel\($pt[0], $pt[1]\); if \($p.A -lt 255\) { $hasAlpha = $true } }; Write-Output \("{0}: {1}x{2} cornerTransparent={3} pixelFormat={4}" -f $f, $img.Width, $img.Height, $hasAlpha, $img.PixelFormat\); $img.Dispose\(\) })
